_meta.session: Physical AI / World Model / VLA benchmark backfill. Adds 3 missing predecessor models (Cosmos-Reason 1, GR00T N1, GR00T N1.5), 24 new benchmarks (Cosmos sub-tasks, ERQA, Bridge V2, DexMimicGen, GR-1 Tabletop, RoboCasa365, Pixmo-Point, BMW deployment, Helix logistics, etc.), and ~70 verified scores from official NVIDIA/DeepMind/Pi/OpenVLA/Figure/Skild/Covariant/AgiBot publications.

benchmarks.name: LIBERO-Spatial
benchmarks.description: LIBERO 4-suite breakdown — Spatial: spatial relation reasoning tasks. Cosmos Policy 98.1 SOTA.

benchmarks.name: LIBERO-Object
benchmarks.description: LIBERO 4-suite breakdown — Object: object identity / category reasoning. Cosmos Policy 100.0 saturated.

benchmarks.name: LIBERO-Goal
benchmarks.description: LIBERO 4-suite breakdown — Goal: goal-conditioned manipulation tasks.

benchmarks.name: LIBERO-Long
benchmarks.description: LIBERO 4-suite breakdown — Long: long-horizon multi-step tasks.

benchmarks.name: Bridge V2
benchmarks.description: Real-robot WidowX manipulation suite — 29-task evaluation. Standard cross-task generalization eval for VLA. RT-2-X 55B baseline 57%.

benchmarks.name: DexMimicGen
benchmarks.description: NVIDIA cross-embodiment dexterous manipulation suite — 9 tasks. Used in GR00T N1 evaluation.

benchmarks.name: GR-1 Tabletop Tasks
benchmarks.description: 24-task humanoid-arm tabletop benchmark on Fourier GR-1 platform. Used in GR00T N1 evaluations.

benchmarks.name: RoboCasa365
benchmarks.description: RoboCasa-Atomic-365 — 300-task RoboCasa extension testing composite-unseen generalization. GR00T N1.5 SOTA 20.0% on unseen.

benchmarks.name: Real-World Language Following
benchmarks.description: GR-1 humanoid pick-and-place language-instruction following rate (NVIDIA GR00T eval). N1.5: 93.3% vs N1: 46.6%.

benchmarks.name: Cosmos Physical Common Sense
benchmarks.description: Cosmos-Reason1 benchmark — Space, Time, Fundamental Physics. Composite avg 60.2%.

benchmarks.name: Cosmos Embodied Reasoning
benchmarks.description: Cosmos-Reason1 combined eval over BridgeData V2, RoboVQA, AgiBot, HoloAssist, AV, RoboFail. Avg 63.7%.

benchmarks.name: Cosmos Intuitive Physics
benchmarks.description: Cosmos-Reason1 — Arrow-of-Time, Spatial Puzzle, Object Permanence sub-tasks for video physical reasoning.

benchmarks.name: RoboVQA
benchmarks.description: Robotic Visual Question Answering benchmark. Cosmos Reason1 80.0%.

benchmarks.name: LingoQA
benchmarks.description: Autonomous-driving question-answering benchmark. Cosmos Reason 2 77.0%.

benchmarks.name: ERQA (Embodied Reasoning QA)
benchmarks.description: 400 multiple-choice VQA — spatial, trajectory, action, state estimation, pointing, multi-view, task reasoning. Used by Gemini Robotics-ER.

benchmarks.name: Pixmo-Point
benchmarks.description: Allen AI pointing-accuracy benchmark for embodied VLMs. Gemini Robotics-ER 1.5: 49.5% vs Gemini 2.0 Flash 25.8%.

benchmarks.name: Physical AI Bench
benchmarks.description: HuggingFace Physical AI leaderboard — visual understanding for Physical AI. Cosmos Reason 2 #1 open-model rank.

benchmarks.name: Physical Reasoning Leaderboard
benchmarks.description: Meta/FAIR physical reasoning leaderboard. Cosmos Reason 2 #1 open-model rank.

benchmarks.name: World Model Visual Memory Horizon
benchmarks.description: How long world-model retains visual context coherently. Genie 3: ~60s.

benchmarks.name: BMW Spartanburg Runtime
benchmarks.description: Cumulative production-line runtime hours for humanoid deployment. Figure 02 + Helix: 1250 hrs over 11-month BMW pilot.

benchmarks.name: Helix Logistics Sec/Package
benchmarks.description: Average seconds per package sorted on Figure 02 + Helix. 60h: 4.31s/pkg, 10h: 6.84s/pkg. Lower = better.

benchmarks.name: Helix Barcode Read Accuracy
benchmarks.description: First-pass barcode-orientation accuracy on package sort task (Figure 02 + Helix logistics).

benchmarks.name: Pick-Retry Reduction
benchmarks.description: % reduction in failed grasps requiring re-attempt (Covariant RFM-1 vs prior baseline). 43% reduction.

benchmarks.name: Humanoid Failure Recovery Time
benchmarks.description: Seconds to adapt and resume locomotion after limb damage / wheel jam (Skild Brain). Lower = better.

benchmarks.name: OpenVLA LoRA Param Efficiency
benchmarks.description: % of params required to match full-FT performance via LoRA fine-tuning (OpenVLA paper).
